productDisplayName: Black Coffee Men Blue Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionBlue and black striped formal shirt with white accents made of 100% cotton, has a slim spread collar, a full buttoned placket, full sleeves with buttonable cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitSlimWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Impeccable cuts and a luxury construction is a winning sartorial combination - and this shirt from black coffee has both. Lead yourself to a new generation of style and sophistication with this cotton shirt. Pair it with straight fit formal trousers, classy accessories and shiny oxfords.
